_comment: Codex CLI PROJECT-LOCAL hook config for the daily-ai-intelligence skill.
_comment_scope: Deploy to .codex/hooks.json in your BRIEFING PROJECT (the repo where you run daily briefs), NOT to ~/.codex/hooks.json. Project-local scope ensures the Stop hook only fires when you are working in that project, not in unrelated sessions.
_comment_stop: Stop fires when Codex finishes a turn. Exit 2 sends stderr as a continuation prompt, preventing Codex from stopping.
